flags.name: --target-branch
flags.description: Explicit base branch for story / task PRs. Propagated to x-pr-create --target-branch and x-task-implement. Default develop preserves legacy behavior.

flags.name: --auto-merge
flags.description: Post-create auto-merge strategy. Propagated to x-pr-create --auto-merge. Default none preserves legacy behavior.

flags.name: --epic-id
flags.description: 4-digit epic identifier (e.g. 0049). When set, adds label epic-XXXX to PRs and epic metadata to logs. Auto-derived from storyId prefix when absent.

flags.name: --auto-approve-pr
flags.description: Parent-branch mode (RULE-004): task PRs target feat/story-... branch, story-level PR human-reviewed

flags.name: --resume
flags.description: Resume from execution-state.json; delegates resume-point detection to x-internal-story-resume

flags.name: --skip-verification
flags.description: Recovery-only. Skips Phase 3 incl. status-finalize. Flagged by LifecycleIntegrityAuditTest outside Recovery contexts

flags.name: --full-lifecycle
flags.description: Force full execution regardless of scope tier

flags.name: --worktree
flags.description: Standalone opt-in worktree (ADR-0004 Mode 2); ignored when already inside a worktree

flags.name: --non-interactive
flags.description: Skip interactive gate menus; auto-approve. For CI / orchestrated calls

flags.name: --skip-review
flags.description: Skip specialist + tech-lead reviews (propagated from x-epic-implement)
